nodes.label: Open a brand-new tab, navigate to Gemini, return the new handle.

Click the 'New chat' sidebar button once. No retry loops.
Click the model picker and select Pro. Returns True if Pro is confirmed visible.
Open the Tools menu and select 'Create image'. Returns True on success.
Find any enabled file input, including inside shadow DOM.
Click the attach/plus button once to reveal the file input.
Return src of images that are large enough to be a generated output.
Wait until a new large image appears that wasn't in before_sources,     and gene
Hover over the generated image and click any Download button that appears.
Process a single prompt job. Opens a fresh tab, runs the full flow,     download
